title: clinopodium glabrum
intro: Clinopodium glabrum, also known as mountain mint or white sage, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Clinopodium glabrum include relief from digestive issues, colds, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe wounds and reduce pain. Clinopodium glabrum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and support the immune system.
